response.overview: # The Story of Manisah (Ozlynn) and Kiambang (Didie Alias) who want to seize the position of president of the Kampung Morten Women's Association, an organization that actively fights for the welfare of women residents in their village named Kampung Lemak Manis. The existence of this association has successfully reduced cases of violence against women of various ages to the point where the young men in the village are afraid and do not dare to hurt them because they fear being attacked by members of the association. Conflict begins when Manisah is dissatisfied with the fate that befalls her mother, Che Embun, who has been stripped of her position as president of the association after being accused of involvement in a scandal with Tok Mudim Sado. The false news was actually spread by the Vice President at that time, Kiah Tumis, which led to her appointment as the new president of the Kampung Morten Women's Association.
response.title: Presiden Kampung Morten
